title: [BEAD] Axios interceptor for transparent token refresh
description:
Story: Login Page & Protected Routes Frontend (metaswarm-softcrm-oex)
Epic: Auth (metaswarm-softcrm-72a)

Configure axios instance: attach Authorization Bearer header from in-memory token. On 401: call /auth/refresh, update stored access_token, retry original request once. On refresh failure: clear session (Zustand), redirect to /login. Implement RequireAuth component for protected routes.

title: [BEAD] Login page UI with Zod validation
description:
Story: Login Page & Protected Routes Frontend (metaswarm-softcrm-oex)
Epic: Auth (metaswarm-softcrm-72a)

Build /login page: email + password fields, Zod schema validation (required, valid email format), inline field-level error display, server error display, loading state on submit. On success: store access_token in memory (Zustand), redirect to /pipeline or intended destination.

title: [BEAD] Auth API endpoints (login, refresh, logout, me)
description:
Story: User Login & Session Management Backend (metaswarm-softcrm-lru)
Epic: Auth (metaswarm-softcrm-72a)

Implement routers/auth.py with 4 endpoints: POST /login (returns access_token, sets httpOnly refresh cookie), POST /refresh (rotates access_token using refresh cookie), POST /logout (invalidates refresh token), GET /me (returns current user). All with Pydantic v2 schemas.

title: [BEAD] JWT auth utilities (sign, verify, bcrypt)
description:
Story: User Login & Session Management Backend (metaswarm-softcrm-lru)
Epic: Auth (metaswarm-softcrm-72a)

Implement auth/jwt.py: create_access_token (15min), create_refresh_token (7d), verify_token using python-jose. Implement auth/password.py: hash_password and verify_password using passlib[bcrypt]. Store refresh tokens in DB for server-side invalidation.

title: [BEAD] Pydantic settings config and async DB engine
description:
Story: API Conventions & Rate Limiting (metaswarm-softcrm-cqq)
Epic: Infrastructure (metaswarm-softcrm-9j0)

Implement config.py using pydantic-settings to load all env vars. Implement database.py with async SQLAlchemy engine (asyncpg) and session factory. Implement pagination helper for list endpoints (page/per_page/sort_by/sort_order).

title: [BEAD] FastAPI app factory with response envelope & rate limiting
description:
Story: API Conventions & Rate Limiting (metaswarm-softcrm-cqq)
Epic: Infrastructure (metaswarm-softcrm-9j0)

Implement main.py app factory: mount all routers under /api/v1/, add JSON response envelope middleware ({data, error, meta}), configure SlowAPI rate limiting (100 req/min general, 10 req/min auth), enable CORS from ALLOWED_ORIGINS, add global exception handlers.

title: [BEAD] Seed script (users, companies, contacts, deals)
description:
Story: Seed Data Script (metaswarm-softcrm-b27)
Epic: Infrastructure (metaswarm-softcrm-9j0)

Write seed.py creating: 3 users (admin@softcrm.io/Admin1234!, manager@softcrm.io/Manager1234!, rep@softcrm.io/Rep1234!), 3 sample companies, 5 contacts, 10 deals spread across pipeline stages. Script must be idempotent (safe to re-run).
close_reason: Implemented in full-stack SoftCRM v1 build

title: [BEAD] .env.example with all documented variables
description:
Story: Docker Compose & Environment Setup (metaswarm-softcrm-bwg)
Epic: Infrastructure (metaswarm-softcrm-9j0)

Create .env.example documenting every required variable: POSTGRES_DB, POSTGRES_USER, POSTGRES_PASSWORD, DATABASE_URL, SECRET_KEY, ALGORITHM, ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES, REFRESH_TOKEN_EXPIRE_DAYS, ALLOWED_ORIGINS, VITE_API_BASE_URL. Mark which are required vs optional with defaults.

title: [BEAD] Docker Compose (dev + prod) configuration
description:
Story: Docker Compose & Environment Setup (metaswarm-softcrm-bwg)
Epic: Infrastructure (metaswarm-softcrm-9j0)

Write docker-compose.yml (3 services: db=postgres:15, backend with --reload, frontend with Vite HMR). Write docker-compose.prod.yml (multi-stage builds, no volume mounts, 2 uvicorn workers). Ports: 5174, 8000, 5432.

title: [BEAD] Initial Alembic migration (all tables)
description:
Story: Database Schema & Migrations (metaswarm-softcrm-90o)
Epic: Infrastructure (metaswarm-softcrm-9j0)

Write single initial Alembic migration creating all 6 tables with indexes (deals.owner_id, deals.stage, deals.company_id, deals.expected_close_date; activities.deal_id, activities.contact_id, activities.user_id), FK constraints, and ENUM types. Migration must run cleanly on fresh PostgreSQL 15.

title: [BEAD] SQLAlchemy ORM models for all 6 tables
description:
Story: Database Schema & Migrations (metaswarm-softcrm-90o)
Epic: Infrastructure (metaswarm-softcrm-9j0)

Define SQLAlchemy 2.0 async ORM models: User, Company, Contact, Deal, Activity, StageHistory. Include all columns, relationships, UUID PKs, ENUM types, and soft-delete (deleted_at) columns per database.md spec.

title: [Story] Login Page & Protected Routes (Frontend)
description:
Epic: Auth Module (metaswarm-softcrm-72a)

As a user, I want the frontend to handle login, token refresh, and protected routes transparently so I never see a broken state.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Login page with Zod validation and inline errors
- access_token stored in memory (not localStorage)
- Axios interceptor refreshes token on 401 silently
- RequireAuth component redirects to /login for unauthenticated users
- Post-login redirect to intended destination

title: [Story] User Login & Session Management (Backend)
description:
Epic: Auth Module (metaswarm-softcrm-72a)

As a sales rep, I want to log in with my email and password so I can access the CRM securely.

Acceptance Criteria:
- POST /auth/login returns access_token + sets httpOnly refresh_token cookie
- POST /auth/refresh rotates access token
- POST /auth/logout invalidates refresh token server-side
- GET /auth/me returns current user
- Auth endpoints rate-limited to 10 req/min
- Passwords hashed with bcrypt

title: [Story] API Conventions & Rate Limiting
description:
Epic: Infrastructure (metaswarm-softcrm-9j0)

As a developer, I need consistent API conventions (response envelope, pagination, versioning) and rate limiting applied globally so all modules share a uniform API contract.

Acceptance Criteria:
- All endpoints under /api/v1/
- JSON response envelope: {data, error, meta}
- List endpoints support page/per_page/sort_by/sort_order
- General endpoints: 100 req/min; auth endpoints: 10 req/min
- All endpoints visible in Swagger at /docs
close_reason: Implemented in full-stack SoftCRM v1 build

title: [Story] Seed Data Script
description:
Epic: Infrastructure (metaswarm-softcrm-9j0)

As a developer, I need a seed script that populates the database with demo data so new team members can evaluate the CRM without manual data entry.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Creates 1 admin user, 1 manager, 1 rep with known credentials
- Creates 3 sample companies, 5 contacts, 10 deals spread across stages
- Script is idempotent (safe to run multiple times)
- Documents demo credentials in README
close_reason: Implemented in full-stack SoftCRM v1 build

title: [Story] Docker Compose & Environment Setup
description:
Epic: Infrastructure (metaswarm-softcrm-9j0)

As a developer, I need a working Docker Compose configuration with 3 services (db, backend, frontend) and a documented .env.example so the entire application can be started with a single command.

Acceptance Criteria:
- docker compose up --build starts all 3 services
- .env.example documents every required variable
- No secrets committed to source control
- Frontend on port 5174, backend on 8000, db on 5432
close_reason: Implemented in full-stack SoftCRM v1 build

title: [Story] Database Schema & Migrations
description:
Epic: Infrastructure (metaswarm-softcrm-9j0)

As a developer, I need a single initial Alembic migration that creates all SoftCRM v1 tables (users, companies, contacts, deals, activities, stage_history) with correct indexes, constraints, and soft-delete columns so the application has a consistent database baseline.

Acceptance Criteria:
- All 6 tables created with UUID PKs
- All FK relationships and indexes defined
- ENUM types for role, size, deal_type, activity type
- soft-delete (deleted_at) on all entity tables
- Migration runs cleanly on a fresh PostgreSQL 15 instance
close_reason: Implemented in full-stack SoftCRM v1 build

title: Auth Module
description: Authenticate users and manage session lifecycle for SoftCRM v1. JWT-based login/logout, token refresh, protected routes, and current-user endpoint consumed by every other module. Route: /login. See spec: .agent-os/specs/2026-softcrm-v1/modules/auth/spec.md

title: Infrastructure & Architecture
description: Set up the foundational infrastructure for SoftCRM v1: PostgreSQL database schema, Docker Compose services, Alembic migrations, seed data, environment configuration, and API conventions. This epic is a prerequisite for all feature modules.

title: [BEAD] Deal detail tabs (Overview, Activity, Contacts, Stage History)
description:
Story: Deal Detail Page UI (metaswarm-softcrm-79l)
Epic: Deals (metaswarm-softcrm-64r)

Build 4 tabs: Overview (edit-in-place fields: deal_type, product_line, probability, currency, primary_contact, owner; lost_reason only when stage=Lost). Activity (chronological timeline + type/subject/body/scheduled_at log form). Contacts (linked contacts list + Link Contact search). Stage History (From/To/ChangedBy/Date/DaysInStage table).

title: [BEAD] Deal detail page header with inline editing
description:
Story: Deal Detail Page UI (metaswarm-softcrm-79l)
Epic: Deals (metaswarm-softcrm-64r)

Build /deals/:id page header: deal title (inline edit on click, saves on blur/Enter), company name (link to Company Profile), stage badge, value (inline edit), expected_close_date (inline edit). Build 12-dot stage progress bar: current dot highlighted, completed stages visually distinct, clicking any dot calls PATCH /deals/{id}/stage.

title: [BEAD] Deal activities and stage history sub-endpoints
description:
Story: Deal Detail API (metaswarm-softcrm-fbs)
Epic: Deals (metaswarm-softcrm-64r)

Implement GET /deals/{id}/activities (paginated activity list for deal). POST /deals/{id}/activities (log activity on deal, sets deal_id). GET /deals/{id}/stage-history (full transition history ordered by changed_at). All with pagination support.

title: [BEAD] Deal CRUD API (get, update, soft delete)
description:
Story: Deal Detail API (metaswarm-softcrm-fbs)
Epic: Deals (metaswarm-softcrm-64r)

Implement GET /deals/{id} (full deal with company, contact, owner). PATCH /deals/{id} (update any deal field). DELETE /deals/{id} (soft delete, requires manager/admin role, returns 403 for rep). All with Pydantic v2 schemas and RBAC enforcement.

title: [BEAD] Deal cards, filter bar, and Add Deal slide-over
description:
Story: Kanban Board UI (metaswarm-softcrm-cdp)
Epic: Pipeline (metaswarm-softcrm-azb)

Build deal cards: company (bold), title, value badge, owner avatar+tooltip, days-in-stage pill (red >14d), probability badge. Build filter bar: My/All toggle, owner dropdown (manager/admin only), deal type dropdown. Build Add Deal slide-over form with all fields, company search/inline-create, contact search filtered by company.

title: [BEAD] 12-column Kanban board with dnd-kit drag-and-drop
description:
Story: Kanban Board UI (metaswarm-softcrm-cdp)
Epic: Pipeline (metaswarm-softcrm-azb)

Build /pipeline page with 12-column horizontally-scrollable kanban. Use dnd-kit DndContext + Droppable/Draggable. On drag end: optimistic update (move card instantly), call PATCH /deals/{id}/stage in background, revert on error with toast. Each column header: stage name, deal count badge, total value.

title: [BEAD] Stage transition API with history tracking
description:
Story: Deals List & Stage Transition API (metaswarm-softcrm-7qe)
Epic: Pipeline (metaswarm-softcrm-azb)

Implement PATCH /api/v1/deals/{id}/stage. On each transition: create stage_history entry with from_stage, to_stage, changed_by, changed_at, and days_in_stage (calculated from previous transition timestamp). Update deal.stage. Return updated deal.

title: [BEAD] Deals list API with filters, pagination, RBAC
description:
Story: Deals List & Stage Transition API (metaswarm-softcrm-7qe)
Epic: Pipeline (metaswarm-softcrm-azb)

Implement GET /api/v1/deals with query params: owner_id (rep restricted to self), stage, deal_type, page, per_page, sort_by, sort_order. Implement POST /api/v1/deals (auto-creates stage_history with from_stage=null). Apply RBAC: rep cannot access other owners' deals.

title: [BEAD] Dashboard KPI cards and Recharts funnel chart
description:
Story: Dashboard Page UI (metaswarm-softcrm-2em)
Epic: Dashboard (metaswarm-softcrm-jyg)

Build /dashboard page: 4 KPI cards (Pipeline Value, Won This Month, Win Rate, Avg Deal Size) in top row. Recharts BarChart with one bar per stage showing deal count. Closing-soon table (Deal Title, Company, Value, Close Date, Owner). Activity feed (type icon, subject, linked deal, relative timestamp, user avatar). Handle empty state gracefully.

title: [BEAD] Dashboard API endpoint with role-scoped aggregations
description:
Story: Dashboard KPI & Analytics API (metaswarm-softcrm-c9a)
Epic: Dashboard (metaswarm-softcrm-jyg)

Implement GET /api/v1/reports/dashboard. Calculate: total_pipeline_value (open deals), deals_won_this_month, win_rate_percent (won/won+lost last 90d), avg_deal_size (avg won value last 90d), pipeline_by_stage (count+value per stage), deals_closing_soon (close ≤ today+14), recent_activities (last 10). Scope by role: rep=own, manager=team, admin=all.

title: [Story] Deal Detail Page UI
description:
Epic: Deals Module (metaswarm-softcrm-64r)

As a sales rep, I want a full-featured deal detail page with inline editing, stage bar, and activity logging so I can manage the complete deal lifecycle from one screen.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Header with inline-editable title, value, close date
- 12-dot stage progress bar (clickable dots update stage)
- Overview tab: edit-in-place fields including lost_reason (Lost stage only)
- Activity tab: chronological timeline + inline log form
- Contacts tab: linked contacts with + Link Contact
- Stage History tab: full transition table with days-in-stage

title: [Story] Deal Detail API
description:
Epic: Deals Module (metaswarm-softcrm-64r)

As a sales rep, I want full CRUD endpoints for deal records, activities, and stage history so the deal detail page can display and update all deal data.

Acceptance Criteria:
- GET /deals/{id} returns deal with company, contact, owner
- PATCH /deals/{id} updates deal fields
- DELETE /deals/{id} soft-deletes (manager/admin only)
- GET/POST /deals/{id}/activities for deal-scoped activity management
- GET /deals/{id}/stage-history returns complete transition history

title: [Story] Kanban Board UI
description:
Epic: Pipeline Module (metaswarm-softcrm-azb)

As a sales rep, I want a drag-and-drop kanban board with 12 columns so I can visually manage my deals and move them between stages.

Acceptance Criteria:
- 12 stage columns rendered horizontally scrollable
- Deal cards show company, title, value, avatar, days-in-stage (red >14d), probability
- dnd-kit drag-and-drop with optimistic update; reverts on API error
- Filter bar: My/All Deals toggle, owner dropdown (manager/admin), deal type
- Add Deal slide-over form creates deal in Lead stage

title: [Story] Deals List & Stage Transition API
description:
Epic: Pipeline Module (metaswarm-softcrm-azb)

As a sales rep, I want API endpoints to list, create, and move deals between stages so the kanban board can display and update pipeline state.

Acceptance Criteria:
- GET /api/v1/deals supports owner_id, stage, deal_type filters + pagination
- POST /api/v1/deals creates deal with stage_history entry (from_stage=null)
- PATCH /api/v1/deals/{id}/stage creates history entry with days_in_stage calculation
- Rep can only filter by their own owner_id

title: [Story] Dashboard Page UI
description:
Epic: Dashboard Module (metaswarm-softcrm-jyg)

As a sales rep, I want a dashboard page that shows my pipeline health at a glance with charts and tables so I can quickly identify deals needing attention.

Acceptance Criteria:
- 4 KPI cards displayed in top row
- Recharts BarChart showing deal count per pipeline stage
- Closing-soon table with correct columns and sort
- Activity feed with type icons, linked deals, relative timestamps
- Empty state handled when no deals exist

title: [Story] Dashboard KPI & Analytics API
description:
Epic: Dashboard Module (metaswarm-softcrm-jyg)

As a sales manager, I want a single API endpoint that returns all dashboard data (KPIs, funnel, closing deals, activity feed) scoped to my role so I can monitor pipeline health.

Acceptance Criteria:
- GET /api/v1/reports/dashboard returns all 4 KPIs
- win_rate_percent: won/(won+lost) over last 90 days
- avg_deal_size: average won deal value over last 90 days
- deals_closing_soon: open deals with close date ≤ today+14
- recent_activities: last 10 ordered by created_at DESC
- Rep sees own data only; manager sees team; admin sees all

title: Deals Module
description: Full deal record management for SoftCRM v1. Inline editing, stage progression bar, activity logging, contact linking, stage history timeline, soft delete. Route: /deals/:id. See spec: .agent-os/specs/2026-softcrm-v1/modules/deals/spec.md

title: Pipeline (Kanban Board) Module
description: Visual drag-and-drop kanban board across all 12 pipeline stages for SoftCRM v1. Primary daily-use screen for reps. Drag-and-drop, optimistic UI, deal creation slide-over. Route: /pipeline. See spec: .agent-os/specs/2026-softcrm-v1/modules/pipeline/spec.md

title: Dashboard Module
description: At-a-glance view of pipeline health for SoftCRM v1. KPI cards, funnel chart, closing-soon deals, activity feed. Data scoped by role. Route: /dashboard. See spec: .agent-os/specs/2026-softcrm-v1/modules/dashboard/spec.md

title: [BEAD] Settings page UI (My Profile tab + Team tab)
description:
Story: Settings Page UI (metaswarm-softcrm-tk8)
Epic: Settings (metaswarm-softcrm-l4c)

Build /settings page with 2 tabs. My Profile: email (read-only), name (editable), avatar_url (editable), change password section (current/new/confirm), save with toast feedback. Team tab (admin only): user table (Name, Email, Role badge, Active/Inactive status, Change Role dropdown, Deactivate button). Deactivated rows: muted styling, no actions. Invite Member modal: email + role fields, show returned temp password.

title: [BEAD] Team management API (invite, role change, deactivate)
description:
Story: Team Management API Admin (metaswarm-softcrm-wpa)
Epic: Settings (metaswarm-softcrm-l4c)

Implement 4 admin-only endpoints: GET /settings/team (all users list), POST /settings/team/invite (create user with temp password, return temp password in response), PATCH /settings/team/{id}/role (change role, admin only), PATCH /settings/team/{id}/deactivate (set is_active=false; deactivated user's /auth/me returns 401). All guarded with admin RBAC check.

title: [BEAD] Profile settings API (view + update + password change)
description:
Story: Profile Settings API (metaswarm-softcrm-bl5)
Epic: Settings (metaswarm-softcrm-l4c)

Implement GET /settings/me (returns current user profile). PATCH /settings/me: update full_name and avatar_url. For password change: accept current_password, new_password; verify current with bcrypt; hash and store new. Return 400 with error if current_password is incorrect.

title: [BEAD] Activities page UI with task completion
description:
Story: Activities Page UI (metaswarm-softcrm-jse)
Epic: Activities (metaswarm-softcrm-xvn)

Build /activities page: My/All toggle, filter bar (type multi-select, owner dropdown, date range picker). Table: Type Icon, Subject, Linked Deal (clickable), Linked Contact (clickable), Owner, Date. Task rows: inline checkbox → PATCH completed_at, strikethrough+muted styling. Row click → expand body inline (no navigation).

title: [BEAD] Activities CRUD API with multi-filter support
description:
Story: Activities API (metaswarm-softcrm-adi)
Epic: Activities (metaswarm-softcrm-xvn)

Implement all Activities endpoints: GET /activities (type, user_id, deal_id, date_from, date_to filters + pagination), POST /activities (standalone, deal_id/contact_id optional), PATCH /activities/{id} (update fields including completed_at for task completion), DELETE /activities/{id}.

title: [BEAD] Companies table UI and company profile page
description:
Story: Companies Page & Profile UI (metaswarm-softcrm-dbf)
Epic: Companies (metaswarm-softcrm-4wo)

Build /companies page: name/domain search, sortable table (Name, Domain, Industry, Size, Contacts Count, Deals Count, Total ARR). Build /companies/:id profile: header with all fields + external website link, Contacts tab (Name, Title, Email, Decision Maker), Deals tab (Title, Stage, Value, Owner, Close Date).

title: [BEAD] Companies CRUD API with ARR aggregation
description:
Story: Companies API (metaswarm-softcrm-e5n)
Epic: Companies (metaswarm-softcrm-4wo)

Implement all Companies endpoints: GET /companies (q ILIKE name/domain + pagination, include contact_count, deal_count, total_arr as sum of open deal values), POST /companies, GET /companies/{id} (with contacts and deals), PATCH /companies/{id}, DELETE /companies/{id} (soft delete).

title: [BEAD] Contact profile page (linked deals + activity feed)
description:
Story: Contacts Page & Profile UI (metaswarm-softcrm-osp)
Epic: Contacts (metaswarm-softcrm-n8r)

Build /contacts/:id profile: header (full name, title, company link, email, phone, LinkedIn external link). Linked Deals section (deal title, stage badge, value). Activity Feed (activities for this contact, chronological). Both sections use TanStack Query for data fetching.

title: [BEAD] Contacts table UI with search, filters, bulk actions
description:
Story: Contacts Page & Profile UI (metaswarm-softcrm-osp)
Epic: Contacts (metaswarm-softcrm-n8r)

Build /contacts page: debounced search bar (name/email), company dropdown filter, decision-maker toggle. Sortable table: Name, Company, Title, Email, Decision Maker badge, Deals Count, Last Activity. Row checkbox + bulk toolbar (Assign to Company, Delete). Click row → /contacts/:id profile page.

title: [BEAD] Contacts CRUD API with search and profile endpoint
description:
Story: Contacts API (metaswarm-softcrm-bie)
Epic: Contacts (metaswarm-softcrm-n8r)

Implement all Contacts endpoints: GET /contacts (q ILIKE name/email, company_id, is_decision_maker filters + pagination), POST /contacts, GET /contacts/{id} (with linked deals and recent activities), PATCH /contacts/{id}, DELETE /contacts/{id} (soft delete). Pydantic v2 schemas throughout.

title: [Story] Settings Page UI
description:
Epic: Settings Module (metaswarm-softcrm-l4c)

As a user, I want a settings page with My Profile and Team tabs so I can manage my account and (as admin) my team from a single location.

Acceptance Criteria:
- My Profile tab: editable name/avatar, change password form with validation
- Team tab visible to admin role only
- Team tab: user table with role badge, status, Change Role dropdown, Deactivate button
- Deactivated users shown with muted styling, no actions available
- Invite Member modal: email + role fields, returns temp password

title: [Story] Team Management API (Admin)
description:
Epic: Settings Module (metaswarm-softcrm-l4c)

As an admin, I want API endpoints to invite team members, change roles, and deactivate users so I can manage my sales team access.

Acceptance Criteria:
- GET /settings/team lists all users (admin only)
- POST /settings/team/invite creates user with temp password, returns temp password to admin
- PATCH /settings/team/{id}/role changes role (admin only)
- PATCH /settings/team/{id}/deactivate sets is_active=false
- Deactivated user's /auth/me returns 401

title: [Story] Profile Settings API
description:
Epic: Settings Module (metaswarm-softcrm-l4c)

As a user, I want API endpoints to view and update my profile and change my password so I can keep my account information current.

Acceptance Criteria:
- GET /settings/me returns current user profile
- PATCH /settings/me updates full_name, avatar_url
- PATCH /settings/me with password change: validates current password, hashes new password
- Returns 400 if current password is incorrect

title: [Story] Activities Page UI
description:
Epic: Activities Module (metaswarm-softcrm-xvn)

As a sales rep, I want an activities page with type/date/owner filters and inline task completion so I can track and complete all my scheduled interactions.

Acceptance Criteria:
- My/All Activities toggle
- Filter bar: Type (multi-select), Owner dropdown, Date range picker
- Table with Type Icon, Subject, Linked Deal, Linked Contact, Owner, Date
- Task checkbox marks complete (PATCH completed_at) with visual strikethrough
- Row expand to show body text inline (no navigation)

title: [Story] Activities API
description:
Epic: Activities Module (metaswarm-softcrm-xvn)

As a sales rep, I want CRUD endpoints for activities with type, user, deal, and date filters so I can log and retrieve all sales interactions.

Acceptance Criteria:
- GET /activities supports type, user_id, deal_id, date_from, date_to filters
- POST /activities creates standalone activity
- PATCH /activities/{id} updates activity including setting completed_at for tasks
- DELETE /activities/{id} deletes activity
- Deal-scoped endpoints (POST/GET /deals/{id}/activities) also supported

title: [Story] Companies Page & Profile UI
description:
Epic: Companies Module (metaswarm-softcrm-4wo)

As a sales rep, I want a searchable companies table and company profile with Contacts and Deals tabs so I can see everything related to an account in one place.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Table with Name, Domain, Industry, Size, Contacts Count, Deals Count, Total ARR columns
- Name/domain search filter
- Company Profile: header with all fields, Contacts tab, Deals tab
- Company searchable in deal and contact creation forms

title: [Story] Companies API
description:
Epic: Companies Module (metaswarm-softcrm-4wo)

As a sales rep, I want CRUD endpoints for companies with search and aggregated ARR so I can manage all company accounts.

Acceptance Criteria:
- GET /companies supports q (name/domain ILIKE) filter + pagination
- GET /companies/{id} returns company with all contacts and deals
- POST /companies creates company
- PATCH /companies/{id} updates company
- DELETE /companies/{id} soft-deletes
- Total ARR calculated as sum of open deal values

title: [Story] Contacts Page & Profile UI
description:
Epic: Contacts Module (metaswarm-softcrm-n8r)

As a sales rep, I want a searchable contacts table and detailed contact profile so I can find and review all information about any contact.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Sortable table with search (debounced), company filter, decision-maker toggle
- Bulk selection with Assign to Company and Delete actions
- Contact Profile: header with all fields, Linked Deals list, Activity Feed
- Creating a contact adds it to the table immediately (no reload)

title: [Story] Contacts API
description:
Epic: Contacts Module (metaswarm-softcrm-n8r)

As a sales rep, I want CRUD endpoints for contacts with search, filtering, and paginated listing so I can manage all my sales contacts.

Acceptance Criteria:
- GET /contacts supports q (name/email ILIKE), company_id, is_decision_maker filters
- GET /contacts/{id} returns contact with linked deals and recent activities
- POST /contacts creates contact
- PATCH /contacts/{id} updates contact
- DELETE /contacts/{id} soft-deletes; deleted contacts absent from all listings

title: Settings Module
description: User profile management and admin team management for SoftCRM v1. My Profile tab, Team tab (admin only: invite/role/deactivate). Route: /settings. See spec: .agent-os/specs/2026-softcrm-v1/modules/settings/spec.md

title: Activities Module
description: Log and track all sales interactions (calls, emails, meetings, notes, tasks) across deals and contacts in SoftCRM v1. Unified activity log for the team. Route: /activities. See spec: .agent-os/specs/2026-softcrm-v1/modules/activities/spec.md

title: Companies Module
description: Manage accounts (companies) that deals and contacts are associated with in SoftCRM v1. Table with ARR, company profile with Contacts and Deals tabs. Route: /companies. See spec: .agent-os/specs/2026-softcrm-v1/modules/companies/spec.md

title: Contacts Module
description: Manage people associated with deals and companies for SoftCRM v1. Searchable table, decision-maker flag, linked deals, activity feed, bulk actions. Route: /contacts. See spec: .agent-os/specs/2026-softcrm-v1/modules/contacts/spec.md
